titleStmt.title: SII 30.239: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 239. (A.R. No. 590 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the second gōpura: right side Jaṭ. Kulasēkhara-Pāṇḍya: Year 13+9: 13th c. A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. It records the gift of 2 achchu for burning 2 twilight lamps by two individuals namely Aḍaṅgaviḷi koṇḍān and Āḷapiṟanta Upādhyāyaṉ of Tiruvīḻimiḻalai to the temple of Pinakkarukkumadēvar of Malaiyaḍikkurichchi, a sourthern hamlet of Sri Parāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brāhmadēya in Āri-nādu. The Sivabrāhmaṇās of this temple accepted to maintain it after receiving this money.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulaśekhara devaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3 Etir 9patāmāṇ
ṭu Ārināṭṭu brahmadeśam śrī parāntakacaturvedi maṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai malaiaṭikuṟicciil Uṭaiyār piṇakkaṟukkun te
var(ṟ)kku tiruviḻimiḻalai Aṭaṅka(ka)viḷi koṇṭāṉum tiruviḻimiḷalai Āḷappiṟantap Upāddhyāyanum Iṭṭa sandhyādipam I
raṇṭukkum Iṭṭa Accu 2 Ivaccu Iraṇṭu śivabrāhmaṇa Ubhayam Āka kaikkoṇṭu candrādittavaṟ celuttutom Āka kaikkoṇ
ṭom Ippaṭikku
Digital edition of SII 30.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
